scenarios.name: AA_premium
scenarios.snapshot:
=== PREFLOP | Button | A♠ A♥ ===
Pot: 2.5 BB | Odds: 2.5:1
Hand: Pocket As (premium_pair, strength 1.00)
Archetype: rfi_opening (confidence 0.85)
Actions: Fold | Call 1.0 | Raise 2.0-100.0
GTO (preflop-classification): bet_medium: 95%, call: 3%, fold: 2% → bet_medium
Action stories:
  fold: "I'm stepping aside — this hand isn't worth playing from here."
  call: "I'm calling to see a flop. My hand plays well postflop but raising reveals too much."
  raise: "I'm raising to thin the field and build the pot with position or a strong hand."

COACH (clear): You're on the Button with A♠ A♥. No one has raised yet — you have the initiative. Cutoff called 1 BB. Your Pocket As is strong. You have a clear story to tell. Raise. You're likely ahead — raising builds the pot when you have the edge. AA is a premium hand — always raise from any position. Always raise.
